name: CodeGemma 7B
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (Gemma 7B architecture, continued pretrain for code)
note: Gemma 7B continued-pretrained on ~500B tokens of code (80/20 code-to-text) with fill-in-the-middle for completion.

results.notes: HumanEval Infilling, single-line variant, for CodeGemma 7B (PT/base), Table 2 of the CodeGemma technical report: 76.09%. The same table also reports a multi-line infilling score of 58.44% for this model, which was not added since the taxonomy has only one humaneval-fim slug.
CodeGemma PT (7B) GSM8K accuracy, Table 5 of the CodeGemma technical report.
CodeGemma PT (7B) MATH dataset accuracy, Table 5 of the CodeGemma technical report.

verificationNotes: Existence and HumanEval/MBPP scores (44.5 / 56.2) for the 7B pretrained variant verbatim-confirmed on fetched ai.google.dev model card. Release date (April 9 2024) confirmed via Hugging Face blog announcement. 8K context confirmed by web search corroborating it inherits Gemma 7B's 8192-token context. No changes made.
